scene_title: Cristo medieval em postura de alerta e aviso
narrative_beat: Manto carmesim e azul-ultramar com maos em aviso

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: colorful vivid medieval Christ figure in crimson and ultramarine robes in alert vigilant stance with open focused eyes and raised warning hand surrounded by prophetic flames in vibrant foreground
subject.focal_point: the raised warning hand and open focused eyes of the vigilant Christ figure
subject.secondary: black and white desaturated modern city at dawn in grey with first light ray on horizon in background
props: medieval Christ in crimson and ultramarine robes

environment.location: threshold between sacred warning and modern city dawn

mood.emotion: Matthew 24:42 — Watch therefore — the command given to our generation

symbolism.primary: the warning hand as the last gesture before the clock runs out
symbolism.secondary: first light on the city horizon as the dawn of the generation that will not pass

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
muted desaturated background palette warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
